response.justification: Strong senior engineering background with 15+ years across diverse stacks, open-source contributions (GISCollective), Linux/Unix familiarity, and founder experience demonstrating architectural thinking. However, the role demands German C1 proficiency and the candidate self-reports only Basic German — a hard blocker for client-facing leadership in a German consulting context. Formal team leadership/Head-of-Development experience and explicit UML/requirements-management background are also thin relative to the executive scope.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering experience across web, embedded, and distributed systems with open-source focus
Founder of GISCollective shows architectural ownership, Linux/Kubernetes deployment, and long-term product stewardship
Active community contributor (workshops, talks, courses) indicating mentoring and communication aptitude
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the C1 hard requirement for client advisory work
No explicit Head-of-Development or formal people-management track record at executive level
UML, formal requirements management, and IT security/compliance experience not evidenced in resume

key_factors.factor: Senior polyglot engineering and open-source/Linux depth
Limited formal leadership and UML/compliance evidence
